results.title: Roof Replacement Specialists Brisbane | Roo Roofing Company
results.description: Your local roofers specialise in Roof Replacement, Roof Repairs, Roof Restoration and Metal Re-Roofing servicing Brisbane & its surrounds.
results.text:
## Brisbane Roof Replacement & Roofing Services

### Roof Replacement Brisbane

A roof replacement transforms your home or structure's appearance instantly and adds significant value to your home and streetscape.

Learn more

### Roof Restoration Brisbane

We offer a range of roof restorations to suit your type of roof, add value to your home and improve its appearance.

Learn more

### Roof Repairs Brisbane

We provide specialised roof repairs to maintain the quality and longevity of your roof, preventing longer term issues.

Learn more

### Gutter Replacement Brisbane

We provide specialised gutter replacements to maintain the structural integrity of your roof, preventing leaks and longer term issues.

Learn more

### Facias, Soffit & Carpentry Work

Rejuvenating or replacing fascia boards, soffits and gables add a finished look to your roof and promote a healthy roof system.

Learn more

### Roof Insulation Brisbane

Insulation acts as a barrier between different temperature zones, stopping or slowing the flow of heat.

Learn more

## Why Choose Brisbane’s Leading Roofers?

Roo Roofing has generations of experience in providing Specialist Roof Replacements and general Roofing and Building Services to Brisbane and its surrounds. Roo Roofing can provide either a Total Roof Replacement, Roof Repair, Patio or a Loving Roof Restoration. We are experts at replacing or rejuvenating tired, dull, faded or rusting roofs and adding value and protection to your home, commercial building or industrial building. Because Roo Roofing has been based in Brisbane for so long, we have the understanding of the local conditions necessary to provide your Roof, Gutters, Fascia and Soffits with the best care.

Do you require a full roof replacement roof or have a leaking roof and are you in need of a roof repair? Then contact us today and we will send a qualified tradesman around to provide you with a free assessment and quote on your roofing and associated building needs.

Your roof is your main defence in keeping your family, possessions and home safe from the harsh Australian weather. A quality roof replacement can transform the appearance of your home instantly, adding significant value to your house for years to come. At Roo Roofing, we only use the most materials with qualified and skilled tradesmen, so you can rest easy knowing that your roof will not only look great but will stay in good condition in the future. We’re so confident that we provide up to 10 years of installation warranty and provide manufacturer warranties of up to 36 years for your peace of mind with all roof replacement works.

* **Generations  
  of Experience**
* **Replace  
  or Restore**
* **Multiple  
  Trade Licences**

## Why Choose Roo Roofing?

### Generations of experience

The oldest Roo Roofing tradesman is 72 years of age and has had over 55 years in the building industry. There are also three tradesman in Roo Roofing that have a working history with each other that goes as far back as the 1980’s.

### Family business

Roo Roofing is proud that we now have a family with three generations and another with 2 generations working for Roo Roofing.

### Up to a 36 yr guarantee

Roo Roofing uses only the highest quality products that come with the industries best available guarantees. Roo Roofing also provides some of the best installation warranties of up to 10 years.

### Fully licensed

Roo Roofing is fully licensed for the works and services provided.

## What our Customers say

* “So happy with the work completed by Roo Roofing. Damien and his team were awesome. We had the roof restored, new gutters and downpipes installed and the fascia painted. Highly recommend Roo Roofing.”

Plus, Roo was very transparent about all anticipated costs, there were no hidden variations, and it was a competitive price compared to other quotes we received.”

  Sincerely  
  Dana
* “Brett from Roo Roofing did a fantastic job cleaning and resealing our clay tile roof.  We were so impressed with his work ethic, great communication, positive attitude and workmanship.  Damien did a fantastic job on admin support – a quick response when we asked for a quote and great communication throughout the job. Would definitely recommend them.”

  Sincerely

  I will highly recommend them just based on communication experience and open and transparent pricing.”

* “We are very happy with the new roof, the boys did a great job and the timing was perfect with the recent storms. We can enjoy the sound of rain on the roof again instead of having to move buckets around! Thanks again, and we’ll be in touch when we start our next stage of renovations.”

  Sincerely  
  Fiona & Mark
* “I recently had my guttering replaced. My Quote was done by MATTHEW who was a Pleasure to deal with. LAUREN kept me well informed when the date of Installation was getting closer. DAMIEN double checked the measuring. What an exceptional worker LEN is, he did my guttering, even though it was raining off & on all that day. He also took away my old guttering. LEI came the next day to finish my carport gutter. Then DARREN & his TEAM put my Blue Scope Steel Gutter Mesh on, which has stopped the Pesky Possum getting into my gutters now. All of these workers were EXCELLENT.  
  RooRoofing your the BEST I give you a 10 out of 10 for all of your WORKERS & the way you conduct your Business.”

  Sincerely  
  Mrs P.Taylor
* “I am writing to you to provide feedback on my experience with Roo Roofing re roof restoration 20 Marara Court Albany Creek. I am extremely satisfied with the finished product. My initial contact was dealt with promptly and in a professional manner. It was due to these actions that influenced me in engaging your firm. Lauren has been courteous, efficient, and professional. Brett was punctual and courteous who kept me appropriately informed throughout the process. His attention to detail was something that you just don’t see these days. Nothing was a problem.”

  Sincerely

## Frequently Asked Questions

Roo Roofing is a trusted Brisbane roofing company known for quality workmanship, honest advice, and long-lasting results. With extensive local experience across Brisbane roofing repairs, roof restorations, and roof replacements, our licensed roofers deliver reliable solutions tailored to Queensland homes. We focus on clear communication, durable materials, and workmanship you can rely on.

Yes. Roo Roofing provides professional roof repairs in Brisbane, including the Brisbane Southside and surrounding suburbs. Whether you need urgent leak repairs, storm damage repairs, or general roofing repairs, our local roof repairers respond quickly to protect your home and prevent further damage.

### What roofing services does Roo Roofing offer?

Roo Roofing offers a full range of Brisbane roofing services, including:  
Roof repairs  
Roof restorations  
Roof replacements  
Metal (Colorbond) and tiled roofing  
Guttering and roof maintenance  
As experienced Brisbane roofers, we work on residential and select commercial properties, delivering complete roofing solutions under one roof.

It depends on your roof’s condition. Roof restoration in Brisbane is ideal if your roof structure is sound but showing signs of wear, leaks, or fading. If your roof is severely damaged, rusted, or nearing the end of its lifespan, a roof replacement in Brisbane may be the better long-term investment. Roo Roofing provides honest inspections to help you choose the most cost-effective option.

Getting started is easy. Contact Roo Roofing to book an inspection with an experienced roofer in Brisbane. We’ll assess your roof, explain your options clearly, and provide a detailed quote for roof repairs, roof restoration, or roof replacement with no pressure and no hidden surprises.
